templates.title: Housewarming Party
templates.template: EVENT: 🏠 Welcome to my humble abode! All players must praise something about the house or drink 2 sips.

templates.title: Host's Open Bar
templates.template: EVENT: 🍷 The host is feeling generous. All sips distributed by the host are worth double (x2).
templates.endTemplate: The host has closed the tap. Normal drinks again.

templates.title: Shoes Off
templates.template: EVENT: 👟 Watch the floor! No one can wear shoes (or they can't touch the floor with them). Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: The House Chef
templates.template: EVENT: 🍳 Before drinking, you must name a dish you know how to cook. If you repeat one already said, drink {PUNISHMENT} extra sips.

templates.title: No Sofa Allowed
templates.template: EVENT: 🚫 No one can sit on the sofa. If someone does, they drink {PUNISHMENT} sips for every minute.
templates.endTemplate: The sofa is a safe zone again.

templates.title: Game Night
templates.template: EVENT: 🎲 All or nothing! If you fail a challenge, drink triple (x3). If you succeed, distribute triple.

templates.title: Annoying Neighbors
templates.template: EVENT: 🤫 Shhh! You can only speak in whispers so as not to wake the neighbors. Anyone who speaks normally drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: The neighbors have gone to work. You can shout now.

templates.title: Health Inspector
templates.template: EVENT: 🧼 The host can order anyone to clean something (or make a cleaning gesture) before they drink. If they don't, drink {PUNISHMENT} extra sips.

templates.title: House Pet
templates.template: EVENT: 🐱 Every time someone drinks, they must make a house pet sound. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Empty Fridge
templates.template: EVENT: 🧊 No ice left! All warm drinks (without ice) are worth x2.

templates.title: Wi-Fi Password
templates.template: EVENT: 📶 Before speaking, you must say the 3-word 'password' chosen by the host right now. If you forget it, drink {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: Wi-Fi no longer has a password.

templates.title: TV Remote Owner
templates.template: EVENT: 📺 Whoever has the remote (or is closest to the TV) decides who drinks every time there is a general drink.

templates.title: No Phones Allowed
templates.template: EVENT: 🚫 Disconnect night! The first person to touch their phone drinks {PUNISHMENT} punishment sips.

templates.title: Heating Broken
templates.template: EVENT: 🥶 It's so cold! Those not wearing a jacket or warm clothing drink double to warm up.

templates.title: House Language
templates.template: EVENT: 🌎 In this house, only an invented language (or a foreign one you choose) is spoken. Speaking the local language = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Vacuuming
templates.template: EVENT: 🧹 You must spin around your chair once before sitting down after each drink. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Manual Labor
templates.template: EVENT: ✋ You can only use your non-dominant hand to drink. If you're right-handed, use the left. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: You can use your good hand again.

templates.title: Nap Time
templates.template: EVENT: 😴 Everyone to sleep! Whoever laughs or speaks loudly drinks triple.

templates.title: No 'P' Words
templates.template: EVENT: 🚫 Forbidden to say words starting with 'P'. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: The House Ghost
templates.template: EVENT: 👻 Choose a player to be the 'Ghost'. No one can speak to or look at them. Anyone who does, drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Guest Protocol
templates.template: EVENT: 🤵 You must say 'Please' and 'Thank you' in every interaction. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips for being rude.

templates.title: Cleaning Day
templates.template: EVENT: ✨ The player with the emptiest glass must drink double to 'clean' its bottom.

templates.title: Knock on the Door
templates.template: EVENT: 🚪 You must knock on the table twice before drinking, as if you were knocking on a door. Fail = {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Crazy Move
templates.template: EVENT: 📦 Everyone change places! The last one to sit in their new chair drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Butler Mode
templates.template: EVENT: 💂 You must serve drinks to others when they need it. Anyone who won't let themselves be served drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.

templates.title: Water for Everyone
templates.template: EVENT: 💧 For every sip you drink, you must take a sip of water. If you don't have water, drink double the alcohol.

templates.title: Gala Dinner
templates.template: EVENT: 🍴 Anyone who uses cutlery (if there's food) distributes double. Anyone eating with their hands drinks double.

templates.title: Home Security
templates.template: EVENT: 👮 No one can enter or leave the room you're in. Anyone who does drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: You can move through the whole house now.

templates.title: Vacation Rental
templates.template: EVENT: 🏨 Every time you drink on your turn, you must choose someone to 'pay' you an extra sip (they drink it).

templates.title: Pajama Party
templates.template: EVENT: 🛌 Everyone to the floor! The last one to touch the floor with their hand when I say 'Sleep!', drinks {PUNISHMENT} sips.
templates.endTemplate: Wake up, the event is over.
